use_cases: Social media link sections with animated hover effects
Portfolio or personal site navigation links
Creative agency or media site link components
ai_summary: A text reveal link component using Framer Motion that creates a flip/reveal animation effect on hover. Each character animates with staggered timing from bottom to top, producing a smooth morphing text effect. Supports dark mode and responsive typography from 4xl to 9xl sizes. Ideal for creating engaging social links, footer navigation, or interactive typography elements in creative portfolios and media sites.
